Scope it all out below.

items.title: Ninja’s popular Crispi 4-in-1 portable glass cooking system is currently starting from $159 ($6 above Prime Day)
items.summary: Over at Amazon you can pick up the popular Ninja Crispi 4-in-1 Portable Glass Cooking System starting down at $159 shipped, which beats out the direct website pricing by $1. Normally $180 without discounts, we’ve seen the deal here for this particular colorway only beaten out by June’s Prime Day pricing of $153. While some of the other colorways have dropped a little lower in price, this is still a solid $21 markdown for the second-best price on this model, while still landing amongst the lowest prices for many of its counterparts. You’ll find even more Ninja deals on appliances, cookware, and more in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Beam wired-only audio to AirPods with Twelve South AirFly SE at just $29 (Matching Prime Day price)
items.summary:
Twelve South AirFly SE Wireless Audio Transmitter

Buy for $28.50 (Reg. $35)

What we love

It not might be the latest model, but if all you’re looking for is something affordable to beam audio from wired-only sources to your AirPods (or other wireless headphones) without carrying a cable around that might not even be compatible, it will certainly do the job. Alongside 20 hours of battery life, it’s not only handy on flights, but also gym equipment, gaming devices, or any other 3.5mm audio jack source.

The coupon is bringing things down from its $170 full price, which we’ve regularly seen discounted to this rate until June’s Prime Day event dropped things to the one-time $118 low that rose to $130 for a short time after. Now, things are back to their usual deal rates with $34 savings at the third-lowest price we have tracked. You can also find more Govee smart lighting deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

Right now, you can lock in a lifetime subscription to OneAir Elite and save for life. Get it today for just $99.99 (Reg. $790) at 9to5Toys Specials.

items.title: UGREEN NeoDrive Go 1TB USB4 SSD with built-in 40Gb/s cable hits new all-time low at $300 (Reg. $500)
items.summary: As part of the ongoing 14th Anniversary sale, UGREEN’s official Amazon storefront is offering its latest NeoDrive Go 1TB USB4 portable SSD for $299.99 shipped. This model debuted earlier this year with a hefty $500 price tag, which is what it has largely been fetching outside a few discounts. Today’s deal knocks just over $200 off that price and delivers 40% in savings. It also comes in $30 below the deal we tracked last month, marking a new all-time low for the drive. At under $300, it offers much better value and is now more competitively priced against other high-speed USB4 portable SSDs from brands like SanDisk and Lexar.

items.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI

items.title: Camplux’s Nano 3 Pro is a portable water heater for showering, dishes, beverages, more, and it’s down at $320 right now
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Camplux is offering folks prepping their July and August camping trips the chance to bring along the Nano 3 Pro Portable Water Heater and Camping Shower for $319.99 shipped. You’d have to shell out $400 for this model at full price, which we’ve almost entirely seen discounted to this same rate in 2026, save for the dip to the $256 low back during Prime Day in June. If you missed you’re chance then, you can pick it up for your outdoor/nomadic adventures here at the next-best price, courtesy of the $80 savings. There are also some additional camping equipment deals available in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Alienware’s Aurora 16X 240Hz RTX 5070 gaming laptop loaded with 64GB RAM/4TB SSD is a whopping $2,500 off today
items.summary: Dell is now offering one of the more loaded configs of the Alienware Aurora 16X gaming laptop for $2,479.99 shipped. This is down from a rather steep $4,980 listed price, putting today’s discount at just over $2,500, or roughly 50% off. We have seen this model listed for less in the past, but it appears to have jumped up due to the rising cost of memory and other components. Even so, $2,480 is a great price for such a packed notebook, particularly with its 64GB of RAM and massive 4TB RAID 0 SSD setup. Head below for more details.

items.title: Keep tabs on muscle gains with this smart body measuring tape down at $27
items.summary:
RENPHO Smart Body Measuring Tape

Buy for $27 (Reg. $32)

What we love

If you want to track workout and weight loss progress, weight can only do so much. Using a measuring tape can help, but that can be a pain to remember, so a smart solution like this can help. It looks pretty sleek to my eye and the price isn’t too shabby at $27 right now.

items.title: Furnish a guest room while this queen bed frame is only $90 shipped
items.summary:
Marsail Queen Bed Frame

Buy for $90 (Reg. $130)

What we love

If your bed frame has seen better days or you have a guest room you’d like to set up without breaking the bank, this $90 offering is worth a moment of your time. The design is pretty basic, which could be a good thing if you want the main focal point of your space to be something else.

If you’ve been wanting to get a 25W MagSafe car charger in your vehicle without spending a small fortune, this UGREEN offering has you covered. You’re looking at $28, and it’s ready to wirelessly top off iPhone 16 or newer running iOS 26 at 25W.

items.title: Three built-in drawers headline this electric standing desk, now $130 (Reg. $180)

HUANUO 48-inch Electric Standing Desk with Drawers

Buy for $130 (Reg. $180)

What we love

A lot of standing desks are a simple surface slapped onto a frame, so when I come across a design that shakes that up a bit, it catches my eye. This solution boasts three drawers, making it easier to keep the main area free of clutter.
